title: WorkForms: How to make embed responsive in Sqaurespace
excerpt:
I created a Contact Form using WorkForms, but it doesn’t seem to be responsive when adding to my Squarespace website. Any idea how to update the code for this, to be responsive? 

Thank you!

posts.author: CreativePants (Mandy Kleinhans)
posts.cookedHtml:
I created a Contact Form using WorkForms, but it doesn’t seem to be responsive when adding to my Squarespace website. Any idea how to update the code for this, to be responsive?

Thank you!

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

Easyform, a monday app that works exactly like a monday workform, has support for responsive forms. You can read all about it in our comprehensive documentation site here, and see it in action here:

Best,
Ronen
